# Protection of Privacy Law

Jurisdiction: Israel
Region: IL
Citation: Protection of Privacy Law, 5741-1981
Authority: Privacy Protection Authority
Source URL: https://www.gov.il/en/departments/the_privacy_protection_authority/govil-landing-page
Topics: notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, security_breach, database_registration, accountability
Keywords: Israel Protection of Privacy Law, Privacy Protection Authority, database registration

## Summary
Israel's privacy law governing databases, privacy rights, security, direct marketing, and regulatory oversight.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess database registration and security obligations.
- Provide notices and rights mechanisms.
- Track Privacy Protection Authority guidance and amendments.
